title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Oil India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Oil India South Asia Partners in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oil India South Asia Partners:
Oil India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oil India South Asia Partners!
